name: Storefront Hero
description: Creator landing page banner with cover image, avatar, bio, social links, and subscribe CTA. The first impression for fans.

standard.description: Full hero with cover image and all details

slots.name: Creator display name with verification badge

minimal.description: Compact header-style hero without cover image, showing avatar, name, and subscribe button inline

video.description: Video background hero with autoplaying muted loop, content overlay, and gradient scrim

visual_brief: Full-width hero banner with a large cover image filling the background (or a gradient if no image). A large circular avatar overlaps the bottom edge of the cover, centered or left-aligned. Below the avatar, the creator's display name as a large heading, a short bio paragraph, social link icons (Twitter, YouTube, Instagram, etc.), and subscriber/follower count. A prominent 'Subscribe' CTA button sits on the right or below the bio. The minimal preset removes the cover image and uses a colored background. The video preset replaces the cover image with an autoplaying muted video loop.

responsive.mobile: Cover image height reduces. Avatar centers above the name. Bio text wraps fully. Social links in a compact icon row. Subscribe button goes full-width.
responsive.tablet: Standard hero proportions. Avatar and text left-aligned. Subscribe button inline.
responsive.desktop: Full-width hero with generous cover height. Avatar, bio, social links, and subscribe button all comfortably laid out.

composition.ProfileRow: Row(centered, gap-4) > [Avatar(large, border) + InfoColumn > [CreatorName(heading2) + Bio(text-muted) + StatsRow > [FollowerCount + PostCount]] + SubscribeCTA(d-interactive, variant: primary)]
